commit.subject: LU-18214 ldlm: don't repocess flock in ldlm_handle_enqueue()
commit.message:
LU-18214 ldlm: don't repocess flock in ldlm_handle_enqueue()

Make both reprocess calls consistent in exclusion of
FLOCK type, until common flock code will handle that
properly.

Signed-off-by: Mikhail Pershin <mpershin@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Iea5356d14cda233ffac02b4d76f8da648a4cda2d
